reasons: Angela can attach to Yu Zhong as he dives, adding shield and support during his backline disruption.
Yu Zhong's extended-fight sustain becomes harder to punish when Angela adds extra survival and slow pressure.

proof.summary: Yu Zhong starts the dive and absorbs pressure, while Angela attaches to keep him alive through the engage and extended fight.
worksBestWhen: Angela attaches as Yu Zhong commits, not after he is already too low.
Yu Zhong dives toward priority targets instead of wasting the shield on empty space.
failureCases: Angela is forced to attach to another teammate first.
Yu Zhong dives too deep without team follow-up.
The enemy saves burst until Angela's shield is gone.

reasons: Floryn's healing can support Yu Zhong even when he dives away from the backline.
Yu Zhong benefits from extra recovery because his value increases when he survives long enough to stack Sha Residue and disrupt multiple enemies.

proof.summary: Yu Zhong creates a deep teamfight, while Floryn adds healing support that helps him survive the commit and continue applying pressure.
worksBestWhen: Floryn saves Bloom for Yu Zhong's real dive or low-HP turn window.
Yu Zhong keeps fighting around teammates who can follow his disruption.
failureCases: Yu Zhong is burst before healing arrives.
Yu Zhong dives so far that the team cannot capitalize.

reasons: Mathilda can help Yu Zhong or nearby teammates reposition around his dive path.
Her shield and movement support make Yu Zhong's engage easier to follow and harder to isolate.

proof.summary: Yu Zhong disrupts the enemy formation, while Mathilda helps the team keep up with or escape around his dive.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda positions near the teammate group that wants to follow Yu Zhong.
Yu Zhong starts fights where teammates can use the mobility route.
failureCases: Mathilda is forced to use mobility defensively before the engage.
The enemy separates Yu Zhong from his follow-up damage.

reasons: Luo Yi can create map-entry opportunities that help Yu Zhong arrive from unexpected angles.
Yu Zhong's disruption can keep enemies close enough for Luo Yi's follow-up marks and reactions.

proof.summary: Luo Yi enables a coordinated entry angle, while Yu Zhong uses that position to dive and disrupt the enemy backline.
worksBestWhen: The team coordinates around Luo Yi's teleport timing.
Yu Zhong enters from a flank instead of running through predictable front vision.
failureCases: Yu Zhong enters before teammates are ready.
Luo Yi has no follow-up charges after the teleport.

reasons: Faramis gives teamfight insurance when Yu Zhong commits deeply into the enemy formation.
Yu Zhong can force enemies to spend damage and control inside a fight window where Faramis keeps the team from collapsing immediately.

proof.summary: Yu Zhong forces a deep fight, while Faramis gives the team a safety layer if the engage becomes a heavy all-in.
worksBestWhen: Yu Zhong fights inside Faramis's protection area.
Faramis saves his ultimate for the real teamfight collapse point.
failureCases: Yu Zhong dives outside the protection area.
The team disengages instead of fighting during the protection window.
